title: Coconut Macaroons
markdown:
Nathan & Thorton,

Ok so your father knows that it is the holiday season (any holiday to be honest) when I break out these cookies. They are achingly sweet and gluten free. You can lessen the sugar content but where is the fun in that?! I love you both dearly.

Mom

* 4 egg whites
* 4 cups shredded coconut, sweetened
* 1 tsp almond extract
* ½ cup granulated sugar
* ⅛ tsp cream of tartar
* Dash of salt if wanted
* Preheat oven to 350 degrees and set a baking tray with a silicone mat aside
* Beat eggs whites in stand mixer until soft peaks form (just past the foamy stage)
* Add cream of tartar and whip until stiff peaks form
* While the mixer is still going add in sugar slowly until stiff peaks get even stiffer
* Add in almond extract and quickly whip into egg and sugar mixture
* Take the bowl off the stand mixer and hand in fold with a silicone spatula the shredded coconut until combined, try not to over mix or it will deflate
* bake 350 degrees for 20 min will golden on the tips
